items.title: UK police force assessing Stansted Airport private flights over Epstein ties
items.description: Essex Police says it is assessing information in relation to private flights into and out of the airport.

items.title: Peru's Congress ousts president after four months in office
items.description: José Jerí is the third consecutive president to be removed and the country's seventh since 2016.

items.title: Rescuers search for nine missing skiers after California avalanche
items.description: Rescuers are racing to the scene, which has seen about 30 inches (76cm) of snowfall in the last 24 hours.

items.title: Climber on trial for leaving girlfriend to die on Austria's highest mountain
items.description: Kerstin G's boyfriend is accused of leaving her unprotected and exhausted close to the summit during a blizzard.

items.title: US says 'meaningful progress' made as Ukraine talks enter second day
items.description: The US special envoy struck an optimistic note after the first day of talks in Geneva, but hopes for a breakthrough remain low.
